'''Sloogarians''' were slimy, slug-like sapients from the [[Sloogaria system/Legends|Sloogaria system]]. They were known to enjoy eating [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] droppings and other treats that most species usually found disgusting. They were also known to stretch the truth for profit. [[Squishmael]] was a member of the species; he told the supposedly true story of Han Solo and the Kessel Run in exchange for a few drinks, and then offered to tell about his "good buddy" Darth Vader's Tauntaun-hunting expedition on Hoth.

{{Species-stub}}
